nodes.label: AI as refinement tool for maintaining personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: I only use AI to help refine it, but afterwards i still double check it and make sure it doesnt read like a robot

nodes.label: AI as quick information lookup tool
nodes.grounding_span: quick research or even item look ups I use AI as i want to find the answer as quick as possible

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I have even had it refer to a section that is not real

nodes.label: AI integration in workplace
nodes.label_negative: AI lack of integration with proprietary databases
nodes.grounding_span: We have a specifically built computer system that we use as our database, which AI does not integrate with

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner vs delegator
nodes.grounding_span: I dont typically ever delegate an entire task

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: People reading the responses should get some form of personal feel

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in work
nodes.grounding_span: i want to find the answer as quick as possible

nodes.label: Trustworthiness and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I would have to read through it as well to make sure it is fact checked

nodes.label: Seamless workflow integration
nodes.grounding_span: AI does not integrate with, and I dont even know how it would

nodes.label: Rejection of AI with unsolicited suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: i wrote the message how I felt and told AI to change it to a polite NO. that was satifying

nodes.label: Frustration with AI in complex Excel tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it kept giving me a formula that didnt work with my data set... Gave up on that one

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for factual accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: although I still double check them typically

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and quality control
nodes.grounding_span: I only use AI to help refine it, but afterwards i still double check it

nodes.label: Selective delegation based on task nature
